ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($Setup.RES_Config_Switch__c.RES_Validation_Rules_Off__c), OR( $RecordType.DeveloperName = "RES_Company", $RecordType.DeveloperName = "RES_Individual" ), $Profile.Name <> "System Administrator", $Profile.Name <> "Diriyah Residential Sales Standard Profile", ISCHANGED(Status) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You do not have the required permissions to update the Lead Status.
